name: Account reclaim: implement out-of-band recovery workflow for blocked reclaim attempts
description: Email-based account reclaim is safely fail-closed blocked, but the promised recovery workflow is unimplemented: no confirmation token to the original email owner, no support escalation/audit trail, and app/account.reclaim_attempt sits in KNOWN_PENDING_ORPHANS with no handler — a legitimate user who recreates their Clerk account with the same email is stuck until manual support notices.
acceptanceCriteria: 1. Resend retry-path test added: handler throws (triggering Inngest retry) when Resend returns a non-ok response (500). 2. Unused accounts import and void accounts; workaround removed from test file. 3. gc1-allow escape normalized to // gc1-allow: <reason> line-comment on same line as jest.mock(. 4. All 7 test cases pass locally and in CI (API Quality Gate, main, Playwright smoke, Merge completeness check all SUCCESS). 5. claude-review re-ran with 0 blocker/must-fix/should-fix findings.
